disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint identifiers for which offer screens are completely blocked. When the requested touchpoint appears in this list, the mapper immediately returns CAN_NOT_OPEN and no offer screen is shown. Accepted values: any touchpoint string that the app passes to getOfferScreenByTouchPoint(). Adding a touchpoint here prevents any subscription offer from appearing at that entry point.

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint identifiers for which offer screens are blocked. When the requested subTouchPoint appears in this list, the mapper returns CAN_NOT_OPEN. Accepted values: any sub-touchpoint string passed as the subTouchPoint parameter. Adding a sub-touchpoint here suppresses the offer for that specific sub-context without disabling the parent touchpoint.

touchpoints.description: Array of touchpoint configurations that map app entry points to offer screen parameters. The app searches this array for a matching touchpoint by name/names; if no match is found, it falls back to the entry with name "default". If no matching entry exists or info is empty, the offer screen fails to load (FAILURE state).

names.description: Alternative list of touchpoint identifiers this entry matches. The app checks if the requested touchpoint is contained in this list via names.contains(touchPoint). Use this to map multiple touchpoints to the same offer configuration. Accepted values: any touchpoint string identifiers. Adding or removing entries changes which app entry points use this offer configuration.

name.description: Single touchpoint identifier this entry matches. The app checks exact equality (name == touchPoint). The special value "default" is used as a fallback when no other touchpoint matches. Accepted values: any touchpoint string or "default". Changing this value re-routes which app entry point uses this offer configuration.

info.description: Ordered list of offer screen parameter sets for this touchpoint. The app iterates through this list in order, evaluating each entry's launch_logic conditions; the first entry whose conditions pass is used. If this array is empty or null, the touchpoint resolves to FAILURE and no offer screen is shown.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the thank-you popup to display after a successful purchase. Mapped to OfferScreenParam.thankYouPopup and passed to the offer screen presentation layer. Accepted values: any string identifier. Changing this value switches which thank-you popup variant appears after the user completes a subscription purchase from this offer.

launch_logic.description: Array of condition sets that gate whether this offer can be shown. The app evaluates each entry independently; if ANY single entry's conditions all pass, the offer is eligible. If this array is empty or null, the offer shows unconditionally (no gating). Adding stricter conditions reduces how often the offer appears; removing conditions makes it appear more frequently.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, gates this launch logic entry behind interstitial ad availability. The app checks canShowInterstitialAd() for the mapped touchpoint; if the ad cannot show, this entire launch logic entry fails. Accepted values: true or false (defaults to false if null). Setting to true diverts users to an interstitial ad flow instead of the subscription offer.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, gates this launch logic entry behind rewarded credit ad availability. The app checks canShowRewardedAd(touchPoint, checkCreditsFlow=true); if the ad cannot show, this launch logic entry fails. Accepted values: true or false (defaults to false if null). Setting to true diverts users to a rewarded credit ad instead of the subscription offer.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation for this offer to be eligible. Used as the lower bound of a range check: days since install must be >= install_day_min. Accepted values: -1 (disabled, no minimum) or any non-negative integer. Increasing this value delays how soon after installation the offer can appear.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum number of editor-done actions the user must have completed for this offer to be eligible. Used as the lower bound of a range check against the stored editor done count. Accepted values: -1 (disabled) or any non-negative integer. Increasing this value requires users to complete more editing actions before seeing the offer.

app_session_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the app session count range for this offer to be eligible. The app session count must be < app_session_end. Accepted values: -1 (no upper bound, only app_session_start applies) or any positive integer. Lowering this value restricts the offer to fewer early app sessions.

editor_done_max.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the editor-done count range. The editor done count must be < editor_done_max. Accepted values: -1 (no upper bound) or any positive integer. Lowering this value prevents the offer from showing to users who have completed many editing actions.

session_limit_start.description: Lower bound (inclusive) of the per-touchpoint in-memory session count range. The offer session count (reset each app launch) must be >= session_limit_start. Accepted values: -1 (disabled) or any non-negative integer. Increasing this value delays the offer until more show attempts at this touchpoint have occurred within the current app session.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package identifiers the user must have previously purchased for this offer to be eligible. The app checks purchase history for any matching package via userHadSubscriptionForPackage(). Accepted values: empty array (disabled, no restriction) or array of package ID strings. Adding packages restricts the offer to returning subscribers of those specific plans.

user_had_subscription.description: Filter based on whether the user has any prior subscription history. The app compares this value against isUserHadSubscription() from purchase history. Accepted values: true (only users with past subscriptions), false (only users without past subscriptions), or null/omitted (no filter). Changing this targets or excludes returning subscribers.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, gates this launch logic entry behind interstitial ad availability with the minimum show interval check skipped. The app checks canShowInterstitialAd(mappedTouchPoint, skipMinShowIntervalCheck=true); if the ad cannot show, this entry fails. Accepted values: true or false (defaults to false if null). Setting to true diverts users to a rewarded interstitial ad instead of the subscription offer.

key_session_start.description: Lower bound (inclusive) of the persistent key-session count range. The key-session count (persisted across app launches, tracked by session_key) must be >= key_session_start. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. Accepted values: -1 (disabled) or any non-negative integer. Increasing this delays the offer until more persistent sessions have been recorded for this key.

install_day_max.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the days-since-install range. The days since install must be < install_day_max. Accepted values: -1 (no upper bound) or any positive integer. Lowering this value restricts the offer to users who installed the app more recently.

is_ai_credit.description: Filter based on whether the user is currently in an AI credit flow. The app compares this value against isCreditFlow(). Accepted values: true (only show during credit flow), false (only show outside credit flow), or null/omitted (no filter). Setting this targets or excludes users who are in the process of using AI credit features.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen for analytics and screen resolution. Takes priority over offer_screen_touch_point (legacy field). Accepted values: any touchpoint string. Changing this value alters which offer screen variant is loaded and which analytics touchpoint is reported.

repeat_key_session.description: Controls periodic display based on persistent key-session count. When not -1 and session_key is non-empty, the offer shows only when (keySessionCount + 1) % (repeat_key_session + 1) == 0. Accepted values: -1 (disabled) or any positive integer. Setting to N causes the offer to appear every N+1 persistent key sessions.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum device storage usage percentage for the offer to be eligible. The cached storage usage percent must be >= storage_min_percent. Accepted values: -1 (disabled) or 0–100. Increasing this value restricts the offer to users with higher storage usage.

is_store_available.description: Filter based on whether Google Play Store billing is available as an active payment type. The app checks if PaymentServiceType.Google is in the active payment types list and compares the result to this value. Accepted values: true (default if null; only show when Play Store is available) or false (only show when Play Store is not available). Setting to false targets users on alternative payment methods such as web billing.

key_session_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the persistent key-session count range. The key-session count must be < key_session_end. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. Accepted values: -1 (no upper bound) or any positive integer. Lowering this value caps how many persistent sessions the offer remains visible for this key.

repeat_session.description: Controls periodic display based on app session count. When not -1, the offer shows only when appSessionCount % repeat_session == 0. Accepted values: -1 (disabled) or any positive integer. Setting to N causes the offer to appear every Nth app session.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen. Used only as a fallback when offer_screen_touchpoint is null. Accepted values: any touchpoint string. Changing this value alters which offer screen variant is loaded, but only if offer_screen_touchpoint is not set.

restricted_packages.description: List of package/offer pairs the user must be eligible for. The app calls isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer(packageId, offerId) for each entry; all must return true for the offer to show. Accepted values: null or empty array (no restriction) or array of objects with package_id and offer_id. Adding entries restricts the offer to users eligible for those specific promotional packages.

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier to check eligibility against. Passed to isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer() as the packageId parameter. Accepted values: any valid subscription package ID string. Changing this alters which subscription package the eligibility check targets.

offer_id.description: The promotional offer identifier to check eligibility against. Passed to isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer() as the offerId parameter. Accepted values: any valid promotional offer ID string. Changing this alters which specific promotional offer the eligibility check targets.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier types the user must currently hold for this offer to be eligible. The app checks if the user's planeMeta.tierType.value is in this list; non-subscribed users match the value "free". Accepted values: empty array (disabled, all users pass) or array of tier type strings including "free" for non-subscribed users. Adding or removing tier types changes which subscription tiers see the offer.

app_session_start.description: Lower bound (inclusive) of the app session count range for this offer to be eligible. The app session count must be >= app_session_start. Accepted values: -1 (disabled) or any non-negative integer. Increasing this value delays the offer until more app sessions have been recorded.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times this offer can be shown per calendar day for a given touchpoint. The daily counter resets after 24 hours. Accepted values: -1 (no daily limit) or any positive integer. Lowering this value reduces how many times per day the offer appears at this touchpoint.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, gates this launch logic entry behind rewarded ad availability. The app checks canShowRewardedAd(touchPoint); if the ad cannot show, this launch logic entry fails. Accepted values: true or false (defaults to false if null). Setting to true diverts users to a rewarded ad flow instead of the subscription offer.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, suppresses this offer during the one-day-pass cooldown period. The app checks isCooldownPeriodPassed(); if the cooldown is still active, this launch logic entry fails. Accepted values: true or false (defaults to false if null). Setting to true prevents the offer from appearing while the user is in a post-one-day-pass cooldown window (default 30 days).

session_limit_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the per-touchpoint in-memory session count range. The offer session count must be < session_limit_end. Accepted values: -1 (no upper bound) or any positive integer. Lowering this value caps how many times the offer can appear at this touchpoint within a single app session.

storage_max_percent.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the device storage usage percentage range. The cached storage usage percent must be < storage_max_percent. Accepted values: -1 (no upper bound) or 1–100. Lowering this value restricts the offer to users with lower storage usage.

offer_variant.description: Variant identifier for the offer screen, passed through to OfferScreenParam.offerVariant and available to downstream offer screen presentation logic. Accepted values: any string. Changing this value may alter which visual variant or A/B test group of the offer screen is rendered.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers that define which offer screens to display. Also used to build the composite key for session counting (touchPoint + "." + screens joined by "."). Accepted values: array of screen name strings. Changing this alters both which offer screens are loaded and the session-counting key, effectively resetting session and daily counters for the new combination.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen for analytics and screen resolution. Takes priority over offer_screen_touch_point (legacy field). Accepted values: any touchpoint string. Changing this value alters which offer screen variant is loaded and which analytics touchpoint is reported.

session_key.description: Persistent session key used for cross-app-session counting via shared preferences. When non-empty, the app tracks and increments a persistent counter under this key. Used with key_session_start, key_session_end, and repeat_key_session conditions. Accepted values: empty string (disables key-session tracking) or any unique string identifier. Changing this value starts a fresh persistent counter, resetting key-session-based gating.

is_one_time_offer.description: Marks this offer as a one-time purchase offer rather than a recurring subscription. Mapped to OneTimePurchaseDetails.isOfferOneTime and passed to the offer screen presentation layer. Accepted values: true or false (defaults to false if null). Setting to true changes the offer screen's purchase behavior to handle one-time payments instead of recurring subscriptions.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen. Used only as a fallback when offer_screen_touchpoint is null. Accepted values: any touchpoint string. Changing this value alters which offer screen variant is loaded, but only if offer_screen_touchpoint is not set.

all_files.role: Determines whether a subscription offer screen should be shown by evaluating session limits, touchpoints, cooldown periods, tiers, ads, and user subscription state.
Interface defining getOfferName and incrementCounts methods for manageable offer screen resolution.
Interface defining operations for retrieving offer screen configurations by touchpoint and managing session/daily counters.
Reads OfferShowLogicApiModel from remote settings, delegates mapping to ManageableOffersMapper, and manages session and daily offer counters via shared preferences.
Maps OfferShowLogicApiModel API response into OfferScreenLaunchEntity domain entities by resolving touchpoint configurations and launch logic parameters.
Root API data model deserialized from remote settings key offer_screen_show_logic_sf, containing disabled touchpoints and per-touchpoint offer configurations.
Contains OfferScreenParam, OfferScreenParamEntity, OfferScreenLaunchEntity, OfferLaunchLogicParams, OfferScreenState, and RestrictedPackagesEntity domain models for offer resolution.
Input parameter data class carrying touchpoint, forceShow flag, used tools state, and pro touchpoint flag for offer resolution.
Sealed interface defining payment service types (Google, Fake, Web) used to check Play Store availability in offer launch logic.
Provides cached storage usage percentage used to evaluate storage-based offer launch limits.
Provides user subscription state, purchase history, active payment types, and package details used for eligibility checks.
Tracks whether a fullscreen offer is currently showing to prevent duplicate offer screens.
Interface for checking interstitial and rewarded ad availability and mapping touchpoints for ad replacement logic.
Delegates ad availability checks to InterstitialService and RewardedAdService and maps touchpoints for offer-to-ad replacement flows.
Interface for retrieving one-day pass configuration and checking if the cooldown period has passed.
Reads one-day pass config from remote settings, manages cooldown timestamps in preferences, and checks cooldown period expiration.
Maps OneDayPassConfigApiModel to OneDayPassConfigEntity domain model including cooldown period data.
Domain entity holding one-day pass cooldown period and visual clue text configuration.
Data class holding cooldown length in days and trial-less days count for one-day pass cooldown logic.
Interface for checking whether the current flow is a credit-based flow, used to evaluate isForAiCredit offer launch conditions.
Interface for awaiting ongoing PA guard subscription grant requests before evaluating offer eligibility.
Manages PA subscription access verification via API calls with mutex-based concurrency and timeout-based await for ongoing requests.
Interface providing subscription eligibility checks for promotional offers, used to validate restricted package conditions.
Koin DI module binding SubscriptionManageableOffersRepo, SubscriptionManageableOffersUseCase, AdParamsRepo, and many other subscription-related dependencies.
Koin DI module binding SubscriptionAccessRepo, SubscriptionAccessUseCase, and subscription access-related dependencies.
Koin DI module binding SubscriptionRepo, SubscriptionInfoUseCase, SubscriptionPackageDetailsUseCase, and payment validation dependencies.
Koin DI module binding OneDayPassConfigRepo to OneDayPassConfigRepoImpl and providing OneDayPassConfigMapper.

tree.role: Determines whether a subscription offer screen should be shown by evaluating session limits, touchpoints, cooldown periods, tiers, ads, and user subscription state.

Reads one-day pass config from remote settings, manages cooldown timestamps in preferences, and checks cooldown period expiration.
Maps OneDayPassConfigApiModel to OneDayPassConfigEntity domain model including cooldown period data.
Interface for checking whether the current flow is a credit-based flow, used to evaluate isForAiCredit offer launch conditions.

Manages PA subscription access verification via API calls with mutex-based concurrency and timeout-based await for ongoing requests.
